market_context: Market sentiment on X/Twitter is cautiously optimistic, with many users discussing potential rate cut signals from recent Fed comments. Pre-market futures for S&P 500 and Nasdaq are up slightly by 0.3% and 0.4% respectively, while notable movers include tech stocks like NVDA with positive buzz. Major news includes an anticipated jobs report revision today, which could sway market direction.

predictions.reasoning: Positive pre-market futures for S&P 500 up 0.3% suggest upward momentum. X/Twitter sentiment leans bullish with discussions around Fed rate cut expectations. However, uncertainty around the jobs report revision tempers confidence.

NVDA is seeing strong positive mentions on X/Twitter, with users highlighting AI sector growth. Pre-market trading shows a 1.2% increase, supporting bullish sentiment. Options flow data indicates heavy call buying for this week.

Negative sentiment on X/Twitter regarding TSLA’s recent delivery numbers missing estimates is notable. Web searches confirm a 5% drop in quarterly deliveries reported yesterday. Short interest data shows a slight uptick, suggesting bearish pressure.
